# kUSBInformationDeviceIsRemoteMask

**Enumeration Case**

The mask indicating that the USB device is remote.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsRemoteMask = (1 << kUSBInformationDeviceIsRemote)
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsRemoteMask
